title: phanera debilis
intro: Phanera debilis, also known as the weak Phanera, is a plant species native to tropical Asia. It is a type of climbing vine that belongs to the family Moraceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Phanera debilis include treating fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, and it can be prepared as a decoction or infusion for consumption, or as a topical application for skin issues.
